purpose: ITE Score Analysis Pipeline v2.1 — end-to-end resident exam analysis from ABFM score report PDFs

raw_pdfs/.purpose: Source ABFM score report PDFs, renamed for clarity
raw_pdfs/.note: Scholl PDFs are encrypted (FLAG 30) — need password or unencrypted versions

pipeline/.purpose: All pipeline code — parser, analyzer, CLI, report builder

key_files.ite_analyze_v2.py: CLI entry point — orchestrates parser → analyzer → report builder
key_files.ite_parser.py: PDF extraction (PyMuPDF) — reads ABFM scatter plot PDFs
key_files.ite_report_builder_v2.js: Node.js DOCX generator — 10-section report + exam version
key_files.abfm_reference_2025.json: ABFM benchmarks, score conversion, SEM values

pipeline/.v1/: Legacy v1 pipeline code (preserved for --v1-only fallback)

per_resident.analysis_v2.json: Full analysis data (consumed by report builder)
per_resident.ITE_{year}_v2_Analysis_{name}.docx: 10-section analysis report + practice questions with answers

archive/.purpose: Historical outputs — v1 reports, v2 test iterations, development artifacts

usage.full_pipeline: python pipeline/ite_analyze_v2.py --blueprint raw_pdfs/{name}_blueprint.pdf --bodysystem raw_pdfs/{name}_bodysystem.pdf --db ../02_ite_intelligence/db/ite_intelligence.db --output-dir reports/{name}_{year} --pgy-level 2 --plugins concept,icd10
